title: Senior Data Analyst (Finance & Regulatory Reporting)
description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Data Analyst (Finance & Regulatory Reporting) in India.In this high-impact role, you will be at the forefront of the hybrid finance revolution, bridging the gap between traditional financial systems and blockchain technology.
